blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: England thrash India as Brook shines in Bristol to secure series win. Harry Brook hit an unbeaten 79 to guide England to a nine-wicket win against India in Bristol, to go 3-0 in the five match series and secure their first T20 series win against the tourists.
